zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna Catharina Menges於1658年9月15日出生在德國沃爾可斯塔阿特 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀賀布斯塔爾時，她的父親Peter Menges Jr.38歲，母親Eva Margaretha Stab48歲。她於1682年5月10日與Hans Georg Steck在德國沃爾可斯塔阿特 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀賀布斯塔爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1725年1月26日在德國沃爾可斯塔阿特 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀武特-斯巴賀享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anna Catharina Menges于1658年9月15日出生在德国沃爾可斯塔阿特 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀賀布斯塔爾时，她的父亲Peter Menges Jr.38岁，母亲Eva Margaretha Stab48岁。她于1682年5月10日与Hans Georg Steck在德国沃爾可斯塔阿特 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀賀布斯塔爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1725年1月26日在德国沃爾可斯塔阿特 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀武特-斯巴賀享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Menges
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from an altered form of the personal name   Magnus  .
German: from the personal name Me(i)ngoss, from ancient Germanic magin ‘strength, might’ + gōt ‘Goth’.
In some cases also an Americanized form of Hungarian Mengesz, a surname of German origin (see above).

variants.name: Manges
meanings: Probably Scottish: variant of Menzies , of which the traditional pronunciation is Mingies.

variants.name: Magnus
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard, Bernd, Egon, Erwin, Kurt, Otto, Reinhard, Volker, Wilhelm, Wolfgang.

German, Flemish, and Walloon: from the personal name Magnus, which is from the Latin adjective magnus ‘great’ or a Latinized form of a short form of ancient Germanic compound names based on the element magan ‘strength, might’. The name was borne by several early Christian saints, including St. Magnus (8th century), a monk in St. Gallen in Switzerland and missionary in Allgäu in southern Germany, whose real name was Magnoald. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine). In Belgium, it may also be a Latinized (humanistic) form of Walloon Legrand .

English, Scottish, Swedish, Danish, Norwegian, and North German: from the Scandinavian personal name Magnus, borne by Magnus the Good (died 1047), king of Norway and Denmark, who was named for the Emperor Charlemagne, Latin Carolus Magnus ‘Charles the Great’, under the impression that Magnus was a personal name. The name spread from Norway to the eastern Scandinavian royal houses, and became popular all over Scandinavia and thence in the English Danelaw. It has also been adopted as a Jewish name.

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

nameMeanings.name: Catharina
meanings: English: An English form of Catharine.

en.lifeSummary: When Anna Catharina Menges was born on 15 September 1658, in Hebstahl, Erbach, People's State of Hesse, Germany, her father, Peter Menges Jr., was 38 and her mother, Eva Margaretha Stab, was 48. She married Hans Georg Steck on 10 May 1682, in Hebstahl, Erbach, People's State of Hesse, Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 26 January 1725, in Unter-Sensbach, Erbach, People's State of Hesse, Germany, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna Catharina Menges est née le 15 septembre 1658, à Hebstahl, Kreis Erbach, Volksstaat Hessen, Allemagne, son père, Peter Menges Jr., avait 38 ans et sa mère, Eva Margaretha Stab, avait 48 ans. Elle a épousé Hans Georg Steck le 10 mai 1682, à Hebstahl, Kreis Erbach, Volksstaat Hessen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 janvier 1725, à Unter-Sensbach, Kreis Erbach, Volksstaat Hessen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anna Catharina Menges am 15. September 1658 in Hebstahl, Kreis Erbach, Volksstaat Hessen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Peter Menges Jr. 38 und ihre Mutter Eva Margaretha Stab 48. Sie hat am 10. Mai 1682 in Hebstahl, Kreis Erbach, Volksstaat Hessen, Deutschland Hans Georg Steck geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. Januar 1725 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Unter-Sensbach, Kreis Erbach, Volksstaat Hessen, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Catharina Menges è nata il il 15 settembre 1658 nel Hebstahl, Kreis Erbach, Volksstaat Hessen, Germania, sua padre, Peter Menges Jr., aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Eva Margaretha Stab, aveva 48 anni. Lei sposato Hans Georg Steck il 10 maggio 1682, nel Hebstahl, Kreis Erbach, Volksstaat Hessen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 26 gennaio 1725, nel Unter-Sensbach, Kreis Erbach, Volksstaat Hessen, Germania, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna Catharina Mengesが1658年9月15日にドイツボルクスタアト ヘセンクレイス エルバチヘブスタhルで生まれた時，父Peter Menges Jr.は38歳，母Eva Margaretha Stabは48歳であった。1682年5月10日にドイツボルクスタアト ヘセンクレイス エルバチヘブスタhルでHans Georg Steckと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1725年1月26日にドイツボルクスタアト ヘセンクレイス エルバチウンテル-センスバチで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Catharina Menges(이)가 1658년 9월 15일 독일 볼크스타앳 헤센 크레이스 르바치 브스탈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Peter Menges Jr.(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eva Margaretha Stab(은)는 48세였다. 그녀는 1682년 5월 10일 독일 볼크스타앳 헤센 크레이스 르바치 브스탈에서 Hans Georg Steck(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1725년 1월 26일 독일 볼크스타앳 헤센 크레이스 르바치 운터-센스바치에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.15. September 1658–26. Januar 1725: 15 de setembro de 1658–26 de janeiro de 1725
pt.Unter Sensbach, Beerfelden, Erbach, Star: Unter-Sensbach, Kreis Erbach, Volksstaat Hessen, Alemanha
pt.Hebstahl, Erbach, Hessen, Deutschland: Hebstahl, Kreis Erbach, Volksstaat Hessen, Alemanha
pt.Unter Sensbach, Erbach, Hessen, Deutschl: Unter-Sensbach, Kreis Erbach, Volksstaat Hessen, Alemanha
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Catharina Menges nasceu em 15 de setembro de 1658, em Hebstahl, Kreis Erbach, Volksstaat Hessen, Alemanha, seu pai, Peter Menges Jr., tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Eva Margaretha Stab, tinha 48 anos. Ela casou-se com Hans Georg Steck em 10 de maio de 1682, em Hebstahl, Kreis Erbach, Volksstaat Hessen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 26 de janeiro de 1725, em Unter-Sensbach, Kreis Erbach, Volksstaat Hessen, Alemanha, com 66 anos.

ru.Unter Sensbach, Erbach, Hessen, Deutschl: унтир-сенсбач, крис эрбач, фолксстаат хессен, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna Catharina Menges родилась 15 сентября 1658 г. в местности хебстахл, крис эрбач, фолксстаат хессен, Германия, её отцу по имени Peter Menges Jr. было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Eva Margaretha Stab, 48. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hans Georg Steck 10 мая 1682 г. в местности хебстахл, крис эрбач, фолксстаат хессен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 26 января 1725 г. в местности унтир-сенсбач, крис эрбач, фолксстаат хессен, Германия в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anna Catharina Menges nació el 15 de septiembre de 1658, en Hebstahl, Kreis Erbach, Volksstaat Hessen, Alemania, su papá, Peter Menges Jr., tenía 38 años y su mamá, Eva Margaretha Stab, tenía 48 años. Se casó con Hans Georg Steck el 10 de mayo de 1682, en Hebstahl, Kreis Erbach, Volksstaat Hessen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 26 de enero de 1725, en Unter-Sensbach, Kreis Erbach, Volksstaat Hessen, Alemania, a la edad de 66 años.
